code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
let m = nums.len()
mut j = 0
while j < m
  let cur_v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if not has_prev
    result = list.push(result, cur_v)
    prev = cur_v
    has_prev = true
  else if cur_v != prev
    result = list.push(result, cur_v)
    prev = cur_v
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
let k = result.len()
mut p = 0
while p < k
  let v = match result.get(p)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if p == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
